scope_note: QA Whittaker Phase-Packet Algebra Cert candidate family [275], standalone unregistered artifact. Layer 3.1 v1 of the Whittaker -> QA development ladder. Hard dependency: registered family [273] qa_whittaker_rational_direction_s2_cert_v1 supplies exact rational S2 directions D_m^(2) through the inverse_stereographic_excluding_south_pole chart. Lineage context only: registered [274] qa_whittaker_scalar_angular_kernel_sampling_cert_v1. CLAIM (narrow): for declared finite symbolic phase packets, exact rational omega, x, t, k, v, and weights, the validator recomputes omega dot x and phase_arg = k * (omega dot x - v*t) as fractions.Fraction values and checks declared witnesses. Allowed symbolic packet families are phase_arg, phase_pair, formal_cos_symbol, and formal_sin_symbol; formal cos/sin symbols are labels only and do not evaluate trigonometric functions. This cert does NOT perform numerical approximation, trig evaluation, spherical quadrature, full Whittaker theorem proof, Maxwell/EM derivation, scalar-potential physics, or physical field reconstruction. Sources: Whittaker 1903, On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics, Math. Annalen 57:333-355, DOI 10.1007/BF01444290; registered [273] S2 cert; docs/specs/QA_WHITTAKER_PHASE_PACKET_ALGEBRA_CERT_DRAFT.md. Checks WPPA_1/WPPA_2/WPPA_3/WPPA_4/WPPA_5/WPPA_6/WPPA_7/WPPA_8/SRC/F; 3 PASS + 7 FAIL fixtures; self-test expected ok before registration.
